[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/11 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: ★3 Asuna (Bunny), ★3 Akane (Bunny)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 3/11 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 3/18 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
